_doc: Failing ReportCompiler job. Info shows ONLY the raw CLR exit code 0xE0434352 (a managed .NET exception escaped the process). This is the generic-exit-code playbook: the code is a symptom, not the cause. The real exception must be recovered from job traces (see jobs-traces). The robot version (see machines list) is old and hides the managed exception behind the OS code.

Data.Info: System.Exception: Job stopped with an unexpected exit code: 0xE0434352
